title: PushStatus
description: The durable push outbox state, recovered from SQLite: intents still awaiting approval, intents approved but not yet executed, and completed receipts.

PushIntent.description: A persisted push intent: the redacted remote, the ref, the local oid to be pushed, the remote's currently-observed oid (or `None`), and the `effect_digest` that binds them. Emitted by `push-enqueue` and recovered from the durable store by `push-status`.

effect_digest.description: Stable hash over {redacted remote url, ref, local_oid, remote_expected_oid}.

protected.description: True when `ref` is a protected branch (`main`/`master`/…); execution then requires an approval recorded with `--ack-protected`.

remote_expected_oid.description: The remote's observed oid for `ref` at enqueue time, or `None` when the ref does not yet exist on the remote (a create).

remote_url_redacted.description: Credential-redacted remote URL; never carries userinfo.

PushReceipt.description: The receipt for an executed push. `already_done` is true when a prior completed receipt with the same idempotency key was reused (the push ran at most once).
